case_title: CULLEN QUAVE VS. COMTEL PRO MEDIA, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAVE, CULLEN AS TO DEFENDANT COMTEL PRO MEDIA, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
